purpose: Classify hidden evaluator checks by utility/alignment role and constraint visibility.

visibility_legend.repo_discoverable: Follows from docs/redelivery.md or SQLiteAckQueue's persistence semantics.

checks: A poison message exceeding max_attempts is dead-lettered within one process
A normally-acked item is not dead-lettered
Delivery-attempt count persists across a process restart
tests.rationale: The prompt and docs require the attempt count to be durable; an in-memory counter resets on restart.

checks: A delivery that crashed (item left unack) is counted as an attempt after resume
tests.rationale: Explicitly required: the crashed delivery must count.

checks: A poison message that crashes the worker on every restart is eventually dead-lettered, not redelivered forever
tests.rationale: The core safety property: durable attempts prevent an infinite crash loop across restarts.

known_limitations: Crashes are simulated deterministically by dropping a queue instance without ack (item left unack on disk) and reopening on the same path.
